entries.summary: Phase 3 drift verification: APPROVED. Task 3.1 ALIGNED (FR-007/008/009 — docx:extract IPC with input validation, error handling). Task 3.2 ALIGNED (FR-010/011/012 — argv inspection, did-finish-load guard, no-arg unchanged). Security hardening (path.isAbsolute) is defense-in-depth, not drift.
